caption: The video captures a medical simulation session, likely part of a training program for healthcare professionals. Two individuals, both wearing masks and scrubs, are intently focused on a screen displaying a close-up view of what appears to be an endoscopic procedure. The camera then shifts to show another person, also in medical attire, seated at a desk with various medical tools and equipment around them. This individual is handling some instruments, possibly preparing or demonstrating their use. The setting includes shelves stocked with supplies and a monitor showing a red-tinted image, suggesting a detailed examination or surgical process. The environment is well-organized, emphasizing the professional and educational nature of the activity. The "Sim Week" logo indicates that this is part of a structured simulation week designed to enhance clinical skills.
